headline: Built for Here Be Giants
subheadline: AI infrastructure to speed up sales talent hiring and cut costs for UK-based marketplaces

challenges.title: Slow Hiring Cycles
challenges.desc: Hiring sales talent takes too long in traditional models. This delays growth for UK-based SaaS companies. Inconsistent candidate quality adds frustration.

challenges.title: High Agency Fees
challenges.desc: Fees from recruitment agencies cut into budgets. This strains finances for small teams like Here Be Giants. It makes scaling operations harder.

challenges.title: Inconsistent Candidates
challenges.desc: Quality of candidates varies widely. This wastes time for talent teams in the UK. It leads to poor hires that affect sales performance.

challenges.title: Middleman Barriers
challenges.desc: Agencies block direct access to talent. This slows down the hiring process for marketplaces. It increases costs and reduces efficiency.

deliverables.title: Talent Matching Engine
deliverables.desc: Builds an AI system to match sales pros with roles based on skills and fit, integrating with your marketplace platform to reduce hiring time

deliverables.title: Fee Optimization Tool
deliverables.desc: Creates tools to minimize recruitment costs by automating fee tracking and negotiations, linking to your existing systems for better financial control

deliverables.title: Candidate Vetting System
deliverables.desc: Develops AI-driven vetting for consistent quality checks, connecting with your database to streamline evaluations and improve hire success rates

deliverables.title: Hiring Workflow Automation
deliverables.desc: Sets up automated workflows to speed up cycles from application to offer, embedding into your platform for seamless UK-based operations

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Review your current hiring infrastructure and pinpoint key pain points based on research

engagementSteps.title: Design and Build
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Create and prototype AI solutions tailored to your marketplace needs

engagementSteps.title: Integration and Launch
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Deploy the systems and ensure they work with your platform for immediate use

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to optimize sales processes like hiring and matching.

faqItems.question: How does this help with hiring cycles?
faqItems.answer: It automates matching to reduce delays in finding sales talent.

faqItems.question: Is this compatible with our UK operations?
faqItems.answer: Yes, solutions are designed for UK-based businesses like yours.

faqItems.question: What costs are involved?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary based on your needs, but aim to lower overall recruitment fees.

faqItems.question: How long does implementation take?
faqItems.answer: Typically 3 months, as outlined in our engagement steps.

faqItems.question: Can it integrate with existing tools?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it integrates with platforms like your AI marketplace.

stackItems.name: OpenAI
stackItems.role: Handles AI matching for sales talent

stackItems.name: Google Cloud
stackItems.role: Provides scalable hosting for your marketplace

stackItems.name: HubSpot
stackItems.role: Manages CRM for tracking candidate interactions

stackItems.name: PostgreSQL
stackItems.role: Stores and queries candidate data securely
